artifacts.title: Canonical Authenticated Workspace
artifacts.purpose: Protected Senior Project workspace for sign-in, role-aware dashboards, evidence link submission, and file upload through production auth and evidence APIs.
artifacts.app_placement: Canonical production app route; alpha.html, account.html, and app-preview.html remain non-canonical.
verification: 2026-05-20: focused workspace source test passed with 3/3 tests.

2026-05-20: local HTTP workspace smoke passed against http://127.0.0.1:8788, proving /workspace.html redirects/serves the canonical route, static assets load, signed-out /api/auth/me returns 401 with authenticated=false, and logout is harmless.

2026-05-20: in-app browser smoke confirmed the visible Senior Project Workspace H1, sign-in prompt, email/password fields, return-to-guide link, no forbidden visible dev-copy terms, and no console errors.
2026-05-20: production-surface checker includes workspace.html, workspace.js, and workspace.css and passed locally.

2026-05-20: evidence upload integration test passed with missing-session, missing-submission, cross-student denial, non-student denial, invalid file, missing Drive config/credential, token/provider failure, success, and resumable coverage.
2026-05-20: local D1 investigation proved the prior invalid_credentials blocker was no fake .test rows in the local Pages dev D1 state, while ignored credentials existed from an older seed.

2026-05-20: scripts/seed-local-workspace-smoke.mjs now seeds local-only fake .test accounts, roles/scopes, a student submission, and evidence fixture, writing passwords only to ignored .secrets/local-workspace-smoke-accounts.json.

2026-05-20: workspace source now renders explicit data-workspace-state="role-pending" and data-workspace-state="permission-denied" access-boundary states; tests/workspace-app.test.mjs executes both render paths with stubbed API responses.
2026-05-20: local Pages dev plus in-app browser verified the no-role account renders Workspace access is pending with zero console errors.
2026-05-20: after commit c6470dfa was pushed, direct live https://senior-capstone-app.pages.dev/workspace.js returned 200 and contained data-workspace-state="role-pending" on the first poll.

2026-05-20: in-app browser signed-in smoke found and verified the workspace form-data fix; student evidence-link submission succeeded through the visible UI, logout returned sign-in UI, and console errors were empty.

2026-05-20: live hosted signed-out workspace passed at https://senior-capstone-app.pages.dev/workspace after /workspace.html redirected; live fake student signed-in API/browser smoke passed for login, student workspace, dashboard, evidence link, Drive-missing upload blocker, unsupported upload denial, and logout.
2026-05-20: live /api/health reports evidence root/index configured but Google Drive client email and private key credential parts missing, so real Drive upload/download remains blocked.
